name: javamark-claude-plugins
description: Personal plugin marketplace for AI-assisted software development and Spec-Driven Development

plugins.name: sdd-toolkit
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development Toolkit: Create specifications, derive features, and use coworker mode for pair programming with Claude. Use this plugin for SDD workflows, spec creation, and the /coworker mode.

plugins.name: java-scaffold
plugins.description: Generate Quarkus/Java project scaffolds: BCE architecture, Panache entities, RESTEasy endpoints, LangChain4j services. Use this plugin when creating new Quarkus modules or features.

plugins.name: openapi-toolkit
plugins.description: Generate and validate OpenAPI specifications. Creates API documentation from code or specs. Use this plugin for REST API design and documentation.

plugins.name: review-toolkit
plugins.description: Code reviews with specialized agents for architecture, security, test coverage, and Quarkus best practices. Use this plugin for systematic code quality checks.

plugins.name: doc-toolkit
plugins.description: Create documentation and blog posts: Technical docs, ADRs, and blog articles from Java projects. Use this plugin for documentation tasks and content creation.

plugins.name: frontend-toolkit
plugins.description: Frontend development with TailAdmin, Alpine.js, and Quarkus templates. Build prototypes, dashboards, and forms. Use this plugin for UI development.

plugins.name: infografik
plugins.description: Create professional infographics as PNG/PDF using Python (matplotlib, PIL). Data visualization, process overviews, and statistics for presentations and reports.

plugins.name: token-budget
plugins.description: Plan, implement, and monitor token budgets for LLM applications. Context window management, cost tracking with alerts, and rate limiting with priority queues for LangChain4j/Quarkus.

plugins.name: wiki-llm
plugins.description: Personal LLM-powered knowledge base — plain Markdown, Git-versioned, searchable and linkable by Claude Code. Inspired by Karpathy's Wiki-LLM concept. Use this plugin to search, save, connect, and maintain a personal wiki across all projects.
